# Job Market Analysis Dashboard

## Overview
Exploratory Data Analysis on 2500+ job listings 
to identify hiring trends across locations, 
companies, job roles and in-demand skills.

## Dataset
- Source: Kaggle
- Rows: 2500+
- Columns: 8 (after cleaning)

## Key Findings
- Top hiring location: United States
- Most in demand role: Data Analyst
- Top hiring company: Meta
- Best platform: LinkedIn (93% listings)
- Most in-demand skills: Data, Analytics, 
  Machine Learning, Technical, Engineering

## Tools Used
- Python
- Pandas
- Matplotlib
- NLTK
- WordCloud
- Jupyter Notebook

## Visualizations
- Month wise job trends
- Top 10 locations
- Top 10 companies
- Top 10 job titles
- Source distribution
- Keyword analysis — Word Cloud
